name: Panthera
description: Firing high-velocity blades, this weapon can also be used as a battle-saw, shredding anything unfortunate enough to get within range.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Firing high-velocity blades, this weapon can also be used as a battle-saw, shredding anything unfortunate enough to get within range.

components.name: Hikou
components.description: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

components.name: Miter
components.description: The Miter launches high velocity saw blades, tearing apart anyone unfortunate enough to be in their path.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Panthera’s primary fire punch-through not working if the first target is killed.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Panthera primary fire punch through going through the environment but not through enemies.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Perrin Sequence sacrifice of Panthera Prime Receiver to Pandero Prime Receiver.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Replaced Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Baza Prime Stock with Panthera Prime Receiver

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performance issues associated with the Panthera Prime and certain Mod combinations.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Riven Dispositions for Panthera Prime and Karyst Prime.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Invoke the wrath of the desert sand with Inaros Prime! Inaros Prime leaves their ancient resting place to arrive with the brutal Panthera Prime, elegant Karyst Prime and much more.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Panthera’s Punch Through not going through enemies.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.changes:
Panthera Alt Fire now consumes 1 Ammo instead of 4.
Fixed the Panthera Alt Fire consuming Ammo when hitting surfaces other than enemies.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Panthera Primary Fire displaying fall-off damage stats in the Arsenal when the projectile doesn’t actually have fall-off damage.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Panthera Alt fire hitting any enemy within a large radius after Hydroid casts Undertow.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Panthera Alt-Fire will now benefit from weapon explosion radius Mods.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Balanced the amount of the Panthera’s Alt Fire beams fired in Limbo’s Rift to match other beam weapons in an effort to reduce performance issues.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.changes: Panthera Primary Fire Critical Chance adjusted to 10% as intended.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Like the Miter, the Panthera is a killer idea with lackluster execution. We've made the following changes:

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with the Panthera when using the primary fire immediately after stopping the secondary fire.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.11.0 & 18.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Panthera’s alt fire consuming less ammo when equipped with a fire rate increase mod. (Speed Trigger, etc.)

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Panthera's alt fire consuming more ammo when equipped with a punchthrough mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Panthera’s blade firing backwards when aimed at the ground.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error that would occur when using Mesa’s Shatter Shield to deflect Panthera blades.
Fixed the Panthera’s alt fire being able to damage squad mates.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Panthera’s alternate fire causing the razor blade to fly backwards when pressed rapidly.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.11
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed visual effects on Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors clones when using the Panthera.
Fixed the Panthera not appearing on the ground for pickup when player becomes disarmed.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.10.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted Panthera audio when hitting flesh or metal.  Firing your weapon on stone will now make the appropriate metal grinding noise!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.10.1
patchlogs.changes: The Panthera’s secondary fire will now stagger enemies on impact.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed visual effects issue on the Panthera’s firing animation.
Fixed various audio FX inconsistencies that would occur when firing the Panthera or Miter.
Fixed Panthera showing a duplicate spinning effect when fired.
Fixed issue where alternate fire modes on the Panthera didn't visually work properly for clients.
